title: lindsaea jamesonioides
intro: Lindsaea jamesonioides, also known as the Jamesoni's Lindsaea or Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Lindsaea jamesonioides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
